commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a repo-backed QA scorecard taxonomy fixture, parser/report builder, coverage-report rendering, and focused tests for report-only validation warnings.

PR surface: Source +736, Tests +211, Other +547. Total +1494 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds QA report taxonomy output rather than fixing a bug. The changed behavior is checkable with the focused Vitest file and `openclaw qa coverage` command listed in the PR body.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; the remaining action is maintainer confirmation of the report-only Stable/LTS taxonomy and proof/CI acceptance.

target.title: Add QA scorecard taxonomy validation
target.body:
## Summary

- Add an initial report-only Stable/LTS scorecard taxonomy fixture for QA coverage inventory.
- Model scorecard selection with taxonomy-owned profiles: `smoke-ci`, `extended`, `release`, `soak`, `advisory`, and `manual`.
- Validate coverage IDs, scenario/docs/code refs, profile/category membership, release-blocking `release` profile coverage, and accidental `--runner multipass` usage.
- Render non-blocking profile/category mapping and validation warnings in `openclaw qa coverage`.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/coverage-report.test.ts`
- `pnpm openclaw qa coverage --output /tmp/openclaw-qa-coverage-scorecard.md`
- `git diff --check`
- `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: QA coverage inventory now emits a scorecard taxonomy section with profile-owned membership and non-blocking validation warnings.
Real environment tested: local OpenClaw source checkout on branch `dallin/coverage-taxonomy-validation`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/coverage-report.test.ts`; `pnpm openclaw qa coverage --output /tmp/openclaw-qa-coverage-scorecard.md`; `git diff --check`; `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`.
Evidence after fix: focused Vitest passed 5 tests; coverage report rendered with `Profiles: 6`, release profile containing 7 release-blocking categories, and `Validation warnings: 0`; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.
Observed result after fix: profile terminology replaced evidence tiers, `smoke-ci` is the deterministic profile, advisory compatibility stays non-blocking, and `openclaw/multipass` is represented as a channel driver on a host runner.
What was not tested: full changed gate, release CI, live provider lanes, and future harness-neutral profile dispatch are not part of this scoped report-only foundation.
target.author: romneyda
